title: euphrasia stricta var. suecica
intro: Euphrasia stricta var. suecica, also known as Swedish Eyebright, is a subspecies of the Euphrasia stricta plant that is native to Sweden and other parts of Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating eye and ear infections, as well as respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Euphrasia stricta var. suecica include its ability to soothe and calm irritated tissues, reduce inflammation, and promote healing, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, sinusitis, and other respiratory conditions. Euphrasia stricta var. suecica can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
